reason: Both answers correctly say no to microservices, correctly identify the CI/CD pipeline as the real bottleneck, both recommend continuous deployment/decoupling deploy from merge, feature flags, faster CI, and both correctly suggest modular monolith (Packwerk) as an intermediate step and cite Shopify/GitHub as scale precedent. The two answers are nearly interchangeable in content, accuracy, and structure — differences (B mentions canary/rollback, A mentions merge queue tooling) are minor stylistic variations that don't change overall quality or usefulness.
